pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Pulsar is a third-party launcher for Space Engineers. The 'linux' branch of SpaceGT/Pulsar adds the runtime patching needed to run Space Engineers natively on Linux instead of via Proton.
This ebuild is a binary repack of the official PulsarForLinux-Native .7z release published by viktor-ferenczi/se-linux-compat. The launcher installs under /opt/pulsar with a /usr/bin/pulsar wrapper and a Games menu entry. Plugins (se-linux-compat, se-dotnet-compat) are not packaged separately; Pulsar fetches them from PluginHub on first run.
